chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Bail Appln. No. S-46 of 2026 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of bail application. 16-04-2026 Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, advocate for the applicant Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State Mr. Ramesh Kumar, advocate for the complainant.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he will not press this bail application provided that the trial court may be directed to expedite the trial and decide the case preferably within three months. Learned D.P.G. and learned counsel for the complainant have raised no objection to such proposal. Accordingly, this bail application is disposed of with directions to he learned trial court to proceed with the case and decide the same preferably within three months. Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
